zh.lifeSummary: 當Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, England於1524年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾阿斯頓 盧萬特時，她的父親Bartholomew Pigot26歲，母親Julian Lenthall21歲。她於1551年1月17日與William Lister在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1600年3月6日享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾吉斯本。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, England于1524年出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾阿斯頓 盧萬特时，她的父亲Bartholomew Pigot26岁，母亲Julian Lenthall21岁。她于1551年1月17日与William Lister在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1600年3月6日享年76岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾吉斯本。

nameMeanings.name: Pigot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Pickett
meanings: from the Middle English, Old French personal name Picot, Pigot, a pet form of Pic (see Pike 6). In Middle English, the form Piket (Old French Picquet) was also common.
sometimes a late development of   Pickard   1 or 2.

nameMeanings.name: Bridget
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Brighid (pronounced ‘breed’); . This was the name of an ancient Celtic goddess, which in Gaulish would have been Brigindos, meaning ‘the exalted one’. St Brigid of Kildare ( c.450– c.525 ) is one of the patron saints of Ireland. Very few facts are known about her life. She founded a religious house for women at Kildare, and is said to be have been buried at Downpatrick, where St Patrick and St Columba were also buried. Many of the stories of miracles told about St Brigid seem to be Christianized versions of pagan legends concerning the goddess. The popularity of the name was further reinforced throughout Europe, especially in Scandinavia in the form Birgit , as the name of the patron saint of Sweden ( 1304–73 ). She was a noblewoman of Irish stock who, after the death of her husband, founded an order of nuns, the Bridgettines. Later she went to Rome and attempted to introduce religious reforms there.

variants.name: Bridgid
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Brighid (pronounced ‘breed’); . This was the name of an ancient Celtic goddess, which in Gaulish would have been Brigindos, meaning ‘the exalted one’. St Brigid of Kildare ( c.450– c.525 ) is one of the patron saints of Ireland. Very few facts are known about her life. She founded a religious house for women at Kildare, and is said to be have been buried at Downpatrick, where St Patrick and St Columba were also buried. Many of the stories of miracles told about St Brigid seem to be Christianized versions of pagan legends concerning the goddess. The popularity of the name was further reinforced throughout Europe, especially in Scandinavia in the form Birgit , as the name of the patron saint of Sweden ( 1304–73 ). She was a noblewoman of Irish stock who, after the death of her husband, founded an order of nuns, the Bridgettines. Later she went to Rome and attempted to introduce religious reforms there.

Many of the stories of miracles told about St Brigid seem to be Christianized versions of pagan legends concerning the goddess. The popularity of the name was further reinforced throughout Europe, especially in Scandinavia in the form Birgit , as the name of the patron saint of Sweden ( 1304–73 ). She was a noblewoman of Irish stock who, after the death of her husband, founded an order of nuns, the Bridgettines. Later she went to Rome and attempted to introduce religious reforms there.

en.lifeSummary: When Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, England was born in 1524, in Aston Rowant, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Bartholomew Pigot, was 26 and her mother, Julian Lenthall, was 21. She married William Lister on 17 January 1551, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 6 March 1600, at the age of 76, and was buried in Gisburn, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, England est née en 1524, à Aston Rowant, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Bartholomew Pigot, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Julian Lenthall, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé William Lister le 17 janvier 1551, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 mars 1600, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Gisburn, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, England è nata il nel 1524 nel Aston Rowant, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Bartholomew Pigot, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Julian Lenthall, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato William Lister il 17 gennaio 1551, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 6 marzo 1600, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, Englandが1524年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアアストン ロワントで生まれた時，父Bartholomew Pigotは26歳，母Julian Lenthallは21歳であった。1551年1月17日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでWilliam Listerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1600年3月6日に76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアギスブルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, England(이)가 1524년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 애스턴 로완트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bartholomew Pigot(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Julian Lenthall(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1551년 1월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 William Lister(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1600년 3월 6일 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지스번에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, England nasceu em 1524, em Aston Rowant, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Bartholomew Pigot, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Julian Lenthall, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com William Lister em 17 de janeiro de 1551, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de março de 1600, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Gisburn, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bridget (Magna Charta Pigot) Pigot married Sir William Lister in 1552 in Yorkshire, England родилась в 1524 г. в местности астон роуант, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Bartholomew Pigot было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Julian Lenthall, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Lister 17 января 1551 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 6 марта 1600 г. в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности гисбурн, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con William Lister el 17 de enero de 1551, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 7 hijas.
